description.value: Create invisible sensor near target creature you choose. Target makes [[/save type=will]] (apply Fortune/Misfortune based on familiarity). Compare your weaving successes to their save successes. If you have more, you can see and hear through sensor. Target has vague feeling of being watched.

system.effect: Create invisible sensor near target creature you choose. Target makes Will save (apply Fortune/Misfortune based on familiarity). Compare your weaving successes to their save successes. If you have more, you can see and hear through sensor. Target has vague feeling of being watched.
system.weavingRoll: Space Potential + Space Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
